template.name: pw_scf.in
pw_bands.in

units.name: Select indirect band gap
units.value: [bandgap for bandgap in band_gaps['values'] if bandgap['type'] == 'indirect'][0]

template.content:
&BANDS
    prefix = '__prefix__'
    lsym = .false.
    outdir = {% raw %}'{{ JOB_WORK_DIR }}/outdir'{% endraw %}
    filband = {% raw %}'{{ JOB_WORK_DIR }}/bands.dat'{% endraw %}
    no_overlap = .true.
/
template.name: bands.in

template.content:
&INPUTPP
    outdir = {% raw %}'{{ JOB_WORK_DIR }}/outdir'{% endraw %}
    prefix = '__prefix__'
    filplot = 'pp.dat'
    plot_num = 11
/
template.name: pp_electrostatic_potential.in
